Prompt_ptimization_system_description.overview: Closed-loop prompt optimizer. Runs executor LLMs on data, measures output quality via an analyzer LLM, uses a generator LLM to rewrite the prompt. Repeats, accumulating history the generator uses to improve.

roles.role: Receives specialized system prompt (task + injected per_model_instructions) and one filled user message. Produces one output string per data item. Only thing the loop optimizes.

Receives all (data, output) pairs for one model in one iteration. Produces analysis prose and a rating dict (bools + floats) with stable schema across all iterations. Measurement only; may point to a prompt cause when certain, but must not rewrite the prompt. Must produce one analysis and one rating from overall performance, not for each (data, output) pair.

Receives full anonymized history: all past prompts, per-model instructions, analyses, ratings. Does not see raw data or raw outputs. Produces next system_prompt, user_prompt, and optional per-model instructions.

loop.step: execute: for each model × each data item, call executor, collect DataOutputs
analyze: for each model, call analyzer on its DataOutputs, store analysis + rating
generate: call prompt_generator on full anonymized history, get next Prompt
repeat from step 1 until all bools True and floats satisfactory

prompt_structure.field: System prompt template. Contains literal {per_model_instructions} slot where per-model instructions are injected at runtime. Shared across all models before injection.
Dict mapping model name to instruction string. Injected into {per_model_instructions} in system prompt. Optional — omit when no model-specific behavior is needed.
